scorecard_question_option_id.description: Id of the selected option in the question's option list. References a `/v3/scorecard_question_options` row.

scorecard_question_answer_id.description: Id of the answer this selection belongs to. References a `/v3/scorecard_question_answers` row.

description: Schema for the 'scorecard_question_answer_options' stream, linked to the '/v3/scorecard_question_answer_options' endpoint.
